summary: Software engineer with 6 years experience in Python and React. Primarily worked in healthcare SaaS building patient management systems. Comfortable with AWS and Docker. Looking to transition to fintech.

positions.title: Software Engineer
positions.description: Built patient scheduling and billing modules using Python/Django and React. Integrated with HL7/FHIR APIs for electronic health records. Deployed services on AWS EC2 with Docker containers. Reduced backend API response time by 25% through query optimization.

positions.title: Junior Python Developer
positions.description: Maintained legacy Python 2 codebase and progressively migrated to Python 3. Built reporting dashboards with React. Wrote unit tests with pytest achieving 80% coverage.

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

projects.title: MediDash
projects.description: Open-source healthcare analytics dashboard built with React and Python/Django. Visualizes patient outcomes and hospital KPIs.

projects.title: FHIR Integration Library
projects.description: Python library for integrating with HL7 FHIR APIs — 200 GitHub stars in the healthcare dev community.
